political.s: FEC: $6K PAC donations; 98% to Republican, 2% to Democratic committees.

environment.s: water pollution violation: $25K in federal penalties (Violation Tracker).

wiki.extract: Del Monte Foods Inc. is an American food production and distribution company and subsidiary of NutriAsia, headquartered in Walnut Creek, California. Del Monte Foods is one of the largest producers, distributors and marketers of branded processed food for the U.S. retail market, generating approximately $1.73 billion of annual sales. Its portfolio of brands includes Del Monte, S&W, Contadina, College Inn, Kitchen Basics, Joyba, and Take Root. Greg Longstreet is the current chief executive officer of Del Monte Foods. Several Del Monte products hold the number one or two market share position. Th

sampleRecords.event_description: Struck by object dropped by person
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was peeling a watermelon when the knife slipped from his hand. He grabbed it and suffered a laceration on his right index fingertip, resulting in an amputation.

sampleRecords.employer: Del Monte Fresh Produce Co - Tampa
sampleRecords.event_description: Struck by other falling object  n.e.c.
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was opening a garage door that was stabilized with a bar. He removed the bar and the door fell on him, resulting in a broken leg.

sampleRecords.employer: Del Monte Fresh Produce N.A., Inc
sampleRecords.part_of_body: Exterior and musculoskeletal structures of the back  unspecified
sampleRecords.event_description: Pedestrian struck by vehicle in nonroadway area  unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was struck by a pallet that was being moved on a forklift. The employee sustained a back injury and a torn right calf muscle.

sampleRecords.employer: Del Monte Fresh Produce N.A., Inc.
sampleRecords.event_description: Collision between a moving and standing vehicle, nonroadway
sampleRecords.final_narrative: On November 8, 2023, an employee was operating a stand-up pallet jack in the warehouse. As he was backing up, the pallet jack struck the basket of a parked aerial lift. His right ankle became caught between the pallet jack and the aerial lift basket resulting in a fractured ankle.

sampleRecords.event_description: Contact with objects and equipment, unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was cleaning machinery when they sustained lacerations on their hand from the machine blade.
